DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT KIMBERLY DOUGHERTY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON NOVEMBER 7, 2008. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PHA

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Barbara Crain, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Kimberly Dougherty is present.
Jenna Yott, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.

Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
